breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's Eclipse Gravity Prediction Label Was Fabricated — E-PRED-C Does Not Exist
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Our WIN-012 analysis cited a prediction label 'E-PRED-C' that doesn't appear anywhere on the dome site. Verified 2026-04-21. Replaced with the actual PRED-TIER-2 prediction (-10 to -13 μGal), which is itself inconsistent with the -6.5 μGal Mohe datum that defines kappa — a 50-100% discrepancy.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: A fabricated citation in our own evidence is a credibility issue. The fix also reveals a genuine new self-contradiction in the dome's own numbers.
